name: Mushy Shroomy's Adventures
desc:
"Marchshroom, welcome to the flowery realm~♥~"
"Danshroom, don't be so stiff, give us a smile!"
"Grayie Shroom, have you already fallen for my irresistible charm? Wonderful!"
"And as for Hoot-Hoot Shroom... I'll choose you, you're looking quite delicious~"
Run, run, the desires of a human are a bottomless rabbit hole.
Come, come, put on a smile, become part of the flowery world!
"Welcome to Sparxie's special show: Everyone Can Become a Cute Sparxie!"
